name: magicpath
description: Use MagicPath to find, inspect, install, create, and edit UI components from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Find, install, and author MagicPath UI components from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use MagicPath through the magicpath-ai CLI to search UI components, inspect source, install React and TypeScript components into applications, work with team projects and themes, and create or edit canvas components from local code.
defaultPrompt: Find a MagicPath button component and help me add it to this app.
Create a new MagicPath canvas component from this repository UI.
Use my MagicPath theme to adapt this component.
